title: chore: update app metrics 2026-06-05
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Polly did her daily rounds, checking on all the community apps and updating their health metrics in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in the APPS and GREENHOUSE markdown files.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory up-to-date with the latest health statuses and usage metrics.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee flying through a digital greenhouse, holding a tiny clipboard and checking on glowing code-plants (representing community apps). A cute monitor robot is watering a plant nearby.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute bee mascot with a tiny clipboard checking on glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. A chunky monitor robot waters a plant nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
